evals.prompt: Find research gaps in LLM fairness
evals.expected_output: HTML gap analysis report containing: literature landscape (yearly chart, top venues, key authors), gap analysis cards (at least 5 gaps across temporal/methodological/thematic types), suggested research questions, and methodology notes.

expectations.text: Landscape data includes papers per year and top cited papers
expectations.evidence: Check Chart.js line chart or table data in HTML report

expectations.text: At least 5 gaps identified across different gap types
expectations.evidence: Check gap cards with type badges

expectations.text: Suggested research questions are concrete and answerable
HTML report follows design system (Crimson Pro, CSS variables)
expectations.evidence: Check HTML head for font and CSS variables

expectations.text: Report file written to reports/ directory
expectations.evidence: Check file path returned to user

evals.prompt: 分析'联邦学习'领域的研究空白，给我HTML报告
evals.expected_output: Chinese-language HTML gap analysis report with all standard sections, Chinese headings and labels, and Chinese punctuation throughout the report body.

expectations.evidence: Check lang attribute in HTML tag

expectations.text: Gap cards and badges in Chinese
expectations.evidence: Check gap type badges and labels

expectations.text: All 5 sections present (summary, landscape, gaps, questions, notes)

evals.prompt: What are the main temporal and methodological research gaps in automated peer review? Give me a report.
evals.expected_output: HTML report focused on temporal gaps (declining areas) and methodological gaps (theory vs. empirical) in automated peer review literature. Should include year-over-year trend data and method distribution.

expectations.text: Temporal gaps identified (topics that peaked and declined)
expectations.evidence: Check for temporal gap type cards in report

expectations.text: Methodological gaps identified (e.g., theory vs. empirical)
expectations.evidence: Check for methodological gap type cards in report

expectations.text: Trend data shows publication counts by year
expectations.evidence: Check Chart.js chart or year table

expectations.text: Research questions derived from identified gaps
Error handling: graceful if topic too broad or APIs fail
